working_on: Routine task SQA-11: seed-graph QA census shard 11 — score 27 edges (C1) + 20 nodes (C2/C3)
declared_scope: Score shard 11 of the T-SEED-QA census: 27 pedagogical_prerequisite edges against C1 (prerequisite soundness) and 20 nodes against C2 (teaching_notes traction) + C3 (summary cold-readability), per the pinned rubric in engine/build_readiness/seed_qa_audit.md. scope_delivery.explanation: Delivered as declared — shard_11.md authored to the fixed evidence-file schema; all 27 edges scored against C1 and all 20 nodes against C2/C3; no descope or reorder. No user confirmation (unattended routine session). No in-band Issues filed. The auto_target.json SQA-11 status flip rides with the close commit per the Issue #122 lifecycle-push-wrapper sequencing constraint.

outcome_summary: Eleventh routine fire of the T-SEED-QA seed-graph QA census. Scored shard 11 — 27 pedagogical_prerequisite edges (C1) + 20 nodes (C2/C3) per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric — and wrote seed_qa_evidence/shard_11.md. Findings: C1 0/27 defective = 0.0% (the census's SIXTH 0-defect shard after 04/06/07/09/10; 23 Sound, 4 Defensible, 0 Reversed, 0 Weak-redundant). C2: 0/20 fail. C3: 1/20 fail (5.0%) — N-17 conditional_logic, load-bearing modal-logic vocabulary in the first two sentences (counterfactual conditionals, non-truth-functional binary connective, Kripke-style frame, accessibility structure, similarity ordering on worlds) without inline gloss; teaching_notes recover via concrete Hoover and match-submerged examples but C3 scores against the summary alone. Same failure shape as shard 09's N-19 modal_systems_hierarchy. Highest audit-touched edge count in the routine batch so far — 5 of 27 = 18.5% (vs shard 10's 2/27 = 7.4%); three involve modal_logic as source (E-3 → epistemic_closure, E-10 → counterfactual_conditional, E-25 → formal_epistemology, all S-0122 direction-flips), plus E-1 explanatory_gap → hard_problem_of_consciousness (S-0122 Levine-1983-before-Chalmers-1995) and E-24 virtue_ethics → moral_particularism (S-0122 phronesis-encodes-particularism). All five scored Sound on the audit-validated direction. E-14 propositional_attitude → proposition is the routine batch's FIRST cycle-deferred-companion edge — 0062 flipped CB-E-63 to proposition → propositional_attitude per S-0122's content-bearers-first reasoning; S-0123 cycle-deferral preserves the opposite direction as a documented co-companion to break the resulting graph cycle. Scored Sound on the cycle-deferral signal (the evidence text explicitly names the keep-decision); calibration anchor for SQA-20. The four Defensible verdicts cluster around the 'discipline → object-of-study' sub-shape (E-2 aesthetics → art, E-4 philosophy_of_mind → mind, E-12 aesthetics → aesthetic_property), plus E-18 anti_intentionalism → intentionalism_artistic (anti-position → position-being-criticized). E-4 is the most extreme instance of the 'target is the more general/foundational concept' shape encountered across the census; held at Defensible per established calibration (concrete-entry-point reading: discipline-as-doorway) but flagged as the SQA-20 rubric-calibration question's strongest tip-to-Reversed candidate. Seven-shard streak (05–11) of the shape continues; closeout question now has seven consecutive data points. Three borderline-PASS C3 calls (N-3 IIT — Φ named-and-functioned not glossed-in-abstract; N-13 qualia_functionalism — qualia ungated in sentence 1 with phenomenal-character gloss in sentence 3; N-18 no_false_lemmas_response — Gettier/JTB motivation requires context, structural content independently parseable). Same calibration as shard 10's N-3/N-12 borderlines. Running C1 across shards 01–11: 10.7% / 3.6% / 3.6% / 0.0% / 3.7% / 0.0% / 0.0% / 3.7% / 0.0% / 0.0% / 0.0%; cumulative 23/299 = 7.7% (down from 8.5%), continuing to tick DOWN under the 13% baseline as the sample grows. Defensible count 4 (counts across shards 04–11: 1/4/6/3/1/2/2/4); over-Defensible-drift watch item ticked up but not unprecedented (shard 06 hit 6). Candidate findings only; disposition is the SQA-20 closeout. SQA-11 marked complete; SQA-12 next. No in-band Issues. mempalace_diary_read_late fires because the boot diary read was authored via direct python (mempalace.mcp_server) rather than via the MCP tool surface — the read DID happen at boot before plan authoring (the soft-warn is observational, not corrective). mempalace_zero_citations_after_search fires for the same benign-shape reason as prior census shards: the boot search surfaced prior-shard diary entries (drawer IDs are diary-entry IDs), and the evidence file and diary reference prior shards (05–10) and the production audit (S-0122) as named-session references rather than drawer-ID citations. 0 validator hard-fails (50 checks on --final-check).
